scopeNotes: Support fragment only. Do not treat this file as active runtime manifest data until the orchestrator merges it.
All candidates use the locked Round-11 modular_submesh_prop technique: rigid prop parented to a live BoneAttachment3D bind bone.
propScale values are initial body-fit suggestions for the WP-A1/WP-SR scale path; they were not visually audited in Showroom by this support slice.

armourProps.name: Quaternius Leather Cuirass

armourProps.rationale: Unused Quaternius chest-armour variant broadens the locked chest-prop silhouette beyond the existing Armor_Metal.fbx overlay while preserving the same CC0 low-poly style family.

knownIssues: The historical Poly Pizza Quaternius bundle URL recorded in Round-8 logs now returns 404, so this draft uses the live Quaternius RPG page plus the archive License.txt for Quaternius provenance.
No Showroom import or body-fit visual audit was run in this support slice; propScale values are initial suggestions for the later runtime/catalog integrator.
